message:
fix: Re-set module loader in Wizer path for ES6 imports

- Add JS_SetModuleLoaderFunc in runWithWizerRuntime (Wizer snapshot may
  have stale function pointers)
- Fix dup opcode to use temp variable (avoid unsequenced sp access)
- Remove typeof/instanceof from comptime handlers (JS_TypeOfValue internal)
- Auto-rebuild .aot when freeze tool changes in benchmark script
